Test Case Description: Valid email format (name@domain.xyz) - verify submission succeeds
Preconditions: User is on Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid email format: name@domain.xyz.
2. Enter valid contact name.
3. Enter valid message (within 500 characters).
4. Click Submit button.
Expected Result: Form submission succeeds and confirmation message is displayed.

Test Case Description: Invalid email format (missing @) - verify error message
Preconditions: User is on Contact Us page
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid email: namedomain.xyz.
2. Enter valid contact name.
3. Enter valid message.
4. Click Submit button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid email format.
